revision.comment: Created page with " {{Navbox | name = Mizuhanome Faith | title = [[Mizuhanome|Mizuhanome Faith]] | listclass = hlist |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Tajimamori]] |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * {{ill|Kitsumoto Shrine|ja|lt_ja=所坂王子|橘本神社|lt=Kitsumoto Shrine}} }}<noinclude> [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Mizuhanome Faith]]Category:second attempt at refreshing on..."
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: remove deleted category Mizuhanome Faith
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
